description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and a mix of materials, including light pink, gray, and white exterior walls. The front entryway is accessible via a dark driveway and is surrounded by lush green trees, providing privacy and a natural aesthetic. Large windows are present on multiple sides, allowing for ample natural light and views of the surrounding landscape. A wooden-fenced backyard area includes a small pool or water feature, enhancing the outdoor living space. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back from the lower, creating a tiered effect. The landscaping is well-integrated, with trees strategically placed around the property for shade and visual appeal.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of pink, gray, and white exterior walls, surrounded by trees and featuring a fenced backyard with a pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and dense tree coverage around the entryway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pink wall, two windows, and a row of trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden-fenced backyard, pool, and upper-level setback.
description_view_3: Side/rear view with a clear look at the backyard, pool, and extensive tree coverage along the side.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, no porch, accessed via a driveway, surrounded by trees and minimal decorative elements.
